since_last: 60% of 101 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.43%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 60% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.00% · BTC +0.64% · Gold +0.15% · Nasdaq100 +0.42%. 60% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.43%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.43%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -0.36%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +4.82%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +4.82%, MDB +4.13%, PUBM +4.08%, TER +4.05%, MRVL +3.43%. Laggards: ORCL -3.12%, DELL -3.04%, TLN -2.95%, SPCX -2.71%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.71% at $120.64
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.71% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
